app.name: Meet 4 Coffee
auth.title: Meet 4 Coffee
auth.subtitle: Recurring coffee chats for teams that actually want to meet.
auth.magicLinkSent: Magic link sent. Check your email to continue.
home.title: Build recurring coffee rituals that people actually show up for.
home.description: Meet 4 Coffee keeps the web app as the source of truth while Slack, Calendar, and Zoom stay in sync around it.
members.title: Members
members.description: Browse the organization, manage opt-outs, and keep profiles current.
clubs.title: Clubs
clubs.description: Create social formats, manage memberships, and keep every round intentional.
breaks.title: Breaks
breaks.description: Upcoming meetings, past meetings, confirmations, reschedules, and ratings live here.
profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Update your organization profile, availability, interests, and language.
profile.name: Name
config.title: Config
config.description: Organization settings, invites, roles, integrations, and billing.

setup.name: Organization name
integrations.title: Integrations
billing.title: Billing
roles.title: Roles
invites.title: Invites
welcome.title: Welcome to Meet 4 Coffee
welcome.description: Create your organization if you are the owner, or join one using an invite link from your owner.
welcome.createOrganizationDescription: Use this if you are setting up a new workspace as owner.
welcome.joinWithInviteDescription: Ask your owner for a `/join/...` invite URL. Open that link while logged in and you will be added instantly.
landing.heroTitle: Build recurring coffee rituals people actually show up for.
landing.heroDescription: A focused workspace for owners and members to run social clubs, confirm breaks, and keep profiles useful.
landing.highlights.title: Highlights
landing.highlights.safePlace.title: Safe Place
landing.highlights.safePlace.description: Sure, everyone is beautiful on the inside, but some are still a lot. Quietly build your comfort zone with opt-out lists and protect your peace.
landing.highlights.randomDrama.title: Random Drama
landing.highlights.randomDrama.descripti: We shuffle matchups so you don't get trapped with the office over-sharer every week. Fresh mix, quick chat, latte intact.
landing.highlights.bossButton.title: Boss Button
landing.highlights.bossButton.descriptio: Some days you just cancel the whole round and move on. One click, full authority, zero explanation.
landing.features.rotatingClubs.title: Rotating clubs
landing.features.rotatingClubs.descripti: Run recurring coffee clubs with clear cadence, seat rules, and member-level participation.
landing.features.ownerControls.title: Owner controls
landing.features.ownerControls.descripti: Keep setup centralized in workspace config while members still join clubs and update their profiles.
landing.features.reliableScheduling.desc: Coordinate rounds, confirmations, reschedules, and reminders without chasing spreadsheets.
landing.pricing.title: Pricing
landing.pricing.freeDetail: For early pilots and small teams validating the flow.
landing.pricing.premiumDetail: For growing organizations that need consistent round operations.
landing.pricing.ultimateDetail: For larger teams running multiple clubs and admin workflows.
landing.getStarted.title: Get started
landing.getStarted.description: If you are creating a new workspace, sign up and create your organization. If you were invited, use your invite link after sign in.
blog.title: Latest from Meet 4 Coffee
